headline: American Water Works Charter Shift And Infrastructure Push Reshape Risk Profile
summary: American Water Works Company (NYSE:AWK) has proposed an amendment to its Restated Certificate of Incorporation to provide for officer exculpation from certain liability under Delaware law. The company is moving ahead with multi million dollar water infrastructure upgrades across West Virginia and Kentucky. The combination of governance changes and capital investment highlights shifts in how the company is managing legal risk and essential service delivery. For investors watching NYSE:AWK,...
